texto: Because that's what it is, boy, it's a fight, or it'd better be. Because if there's something in me that's trying to kill me, maybe I can't get rid of it, but I don't have to make it welcome, and I'm sure not going to pretend it ain't there.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Cruce Stark sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Because that's what it is, boy, it's a fight, or it'd better be. Because if there's something in …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, inspirational-attitude, reflexao, útil em momentos de inspiracao e termino.

frase_original: Because that's what it is, boy, it's a fight, or it'd better be. Because if there's something in me that's trying to kill me, maybe I can't get rid of it, but I don't have to make it welcome, and I'm sure not going to pretend it ain't there.

texto: According to this model, human beings are, at least in one aspect, sensation-receiving machines; and although our receptory apparatus is competent to select and organize outward stimuli within the narrow range necessary for physical survival within our environment, it does not necessarily tell us very much about the nature of that environment. People, in other words, have little access to the possible world existing beyond their sensations.
explicacao: Citação de Cruce Stark sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “According to this model, human beings are, at least in one aspect, sensation-receiving machines; …” articula reflexao, perception, reality em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reality e sensation.
